turns.content: What brings you in today?
My stomach's been hurting off and on for a few weeks. I don't feel like eating much.
When did this start?
I guess about three weeks ago, maybe a little more.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
It's like a dull ache, right here in the middle. Not sharp or anything. Just there, off and on.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No, nothing like that.
What medications are you currently taking?
I'm not on anything right now. Just a multivitamin sometimes.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
No, not really. Nothing serious.
Are you allergic to any medications?
No, I don't think so.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I just drank some ginger tea, but it didn't help much.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Not really. Just comes and goes no matter what I do or eat.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
I've been missing some work. Standing at the register all day makes it worse, so I've taken a few days off.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
No, I don't smoke. I might have a beer now and then, but not much.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Not that I know of. My mom had some stomach trouble, but I don't know what it was exactly.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No, never felt this before. Just the occasional upset stomach, but nothing that lasted this long.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yes, I think so.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, maybe a 3. It's not terrible, just annoying. Emotionally, a 2. I'm just tired of it, that's all.
Do you have any questions for me?
No, I think you covered everything. Whatever you think, doc.
What do you think might be going on?
I don't know. That's why I came to you. Something's just not right in my stomach.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
No, I think that's everything. Just tired of it, you know.
